name: 20-invalid-attestation-predicate-type
description: The in-toto Statement inside the DSSE envelope declares predicateType `https://slsa.dev/provenance/v1` (a valid SLSA Provenance v1 identifier) instead of the AIBOM predicateType URI. Verifier rejects at attestation-shape stage per ADR-0004 fail-closed mode 5.
notes: This fixture simulates cross-predicate replay: an attacker presents a validly-signed SLSA provenance statement where an AIBOM attestation is expected. Defense requires the verifier to check predicateType equality exactly against the AIBOM URI for the schema version being verified; payloadType check alone (application/vnd.in-toto+json) does not distinguish AIBOM from SLSA or any other in-toto predicate. Sister fixtures in this series: 21 (wrong subject count) and 22 (wrong digest algorithm).
